# VS Code Copilot Resource Sync

> PowerShell toolkit to sync and manage GitHub Copilot agents, instructions, skills, hooks, and workflows from the awesome-copilot community catalogue.

vscode-copilot-sync is an open-source PowerShell toolkit (MIT licence) that makes it easy to
cherry-pick and lifecycle-manage resources from github/awesome-copilot into VS Code.
Works on Windows, macOS, and Linux via PowerShell 7+.

## Key pages

- README: https://github.com/CTOUT/vscode-copilot-sync/blob/main/README.md
- Changelog: https://github.com/CTOUT/vscode-copilot-sync/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
